domain: learning-curve psychology / scaling-law physics (power-law error decay)
specific_mechanism: hallucination_rate ~= c * N^{-β} with β = 0.4 ± 0.1 in parameter count N
llm_application: hallucination rate scales as power law with parameter count, exponent ~0.4 universal across architectures
novelty_claim: specific β=0.4 exponent universal across models — testable
